title: Wayfarer
description: Improves the locator bar and provides waypoint rendering.
body:
![What is Wayfarer?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e59e9eaa970e2735ce86a946fa6ba1ebf84f817.png)
![Waypoint demo.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59e529f2f2b2b0b952a8592c182cdc8bf06452d2_0.webp)
<center>

[![Available on Fabric](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac0bc7e6302dfcd03ec2e46fd86aaa3e65ebe236.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/wayfarerlib/versions?l=fabric)     
[![Available on Neoforge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e51e7f024c0d0e40b371ebd393ef9175450f2fd.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/wayfarerlib/versions?l=neoforge)       [![Only on Modrinth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe0dc8767a516ef71e0b49892e0cdf556d740d9a_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/wayfarerlib)
</center>

> **Wayfarer** implements a waypoint rendering system and aims to improve the locator bar, all in a way that can be utilized by other developers in their projects!

> **Client-side**, the mod handles waypoint rendering in-world and on the locator bar. There are many customization options to tweak waypoint visuals.

> **Server-side**, the mod handles server-to-client waypoint data and synchronization to tell the client what to render. Not all projects need this, client-side mods can just utilize the waypoint renderer directly!

![I'm not a developer.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/500a227161d57176a191e7b8d6234b36e51683ad.png)
> That's alright; Wayfarer **is** still useful on its own! Its standalone features include:

> ## Improved Locator Bar
> - Wayfarer adds a **hold** keybind to manually toggle the locator bar.
> - In survival, locator bar icons render over the experience bar instead of replacing it with the locator bar, so you can still see your experience!
> - Head icons are shown for players on the locator bar.
> - Instead of icons getting smaller as they get far away, they become more translucent.

> ## Try These Mods:
> [![Immersive Waypoinst Mod Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/k6uLI8Y9/2996ff23e237ea3f771eac30b97e55b0230325e1_96.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-maps)

![How do I use it?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17ccbccfbdf9312c2a78e79b04c7674dc81e0689.png)
You can find an **API Reference** guide and some examples on how to integrate with **Wayfarer** on the [**Wiki**](https://playgroundmods.github.io/projects/wayfarer/).

<center>

 ## Join us. Thrive.
[![The Playground](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1da14c54b0a74c16ba2e1e250f4cc46b5e359b4.png)](https://discord.gg/Fuuxaq6KPh)
</center>
